name: Oriental Beef and Pea Pods
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and cut up Med. Green Pepper into small strips.
2. Cut Steak into paper-thin strips, about 3-inches long (Tenderloin Tip or Round steak).
3. Break cauliflower into florets; cut each into 1/4-inch slices.
4. Combine cauliflower, green pepper, beef, and onion in a 2-quart casserole.
5. Drizzle with soy sauce; stir lightly to coat evenly.
6. Cover and microwave on high (100%) for 6 minutes; stir.
7. Cover and microwave until meat is no longer pink, about 3 to 5 minutes.
8. Add Frozen Pea Pods. Cover and microwave until pea pods are thawed, about 2 to 3 minutes.
9. Mix water, cornstarch, bouillon, and sugar in a 4-cup glass measure. Stir in juices from meat.
10. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 2 1/2 minutes; stir.
11. Microwave until boiling, about 2 to 3 minutes.
12. Stir into meat mixture. Serve over hot rice.
